h1: LG 12kg Front Load Washer with AI DD® & Steam+ — VIVACE Series, Black Steel, Tempered Glass Door (WFV1214BST1)

gallery.a: Front view of LG WFV1214BST1 12 kg front load washer in Black Steel
45 degree angled view of the washer
Door open revealing the full-stainless-steel drum

modules.head: Next-generation 12 kg front-load performance
modules.body: LG's VIVACE series brings next-generation motor performance, refined Black Steel styling and a premium tempered-glass door to your laundry room — power, style and smart control in a compact 600 × 850 × 610 mm chassis.

modules.eye: Intelligent Fabric Care with AI DD®
modules.head: Up to 18% better fabric protection
modules.body: AI Direct Drive senses load weight and fabric softness, then auto-selects the optimal wash motion from 6 Motion DD patterns — protecting delicates while delivering a deeper clean on everyday loads.
modules.disc: *Based on LG internal testing vs. Normal cycle.

imgs.a: AI DD detects and adapts to each load

modules.head: Less Time, More Life
modules.body: TurboWash™ with multi-directional spray rinses detergent through fabrics faster for a deep clean in record time — ideal for busy households.

modules.head: 99.9% Allergen Removal, 30% Less Wrinkles
modules.body: True Steam+ cycle helps eliminate 99.9% of common household allergens and leaves clothes with up to 30% fewer wrinkles — certified allergen care for bedding, baby laundry and delicates.
modules.disc: *Based on LG internal testing. Certified allergen care.

modules.head: 12 kg XL drum, standard 600 mm width
modules.body: LG's redesigned drum fits more laundry in the same external footprint — a 12 kg wash capacity inside the standard 600 mm width every laundry room is already built for.

modules.head: More Durable, More Hygienic
modules.body: A corrosion-resistant full-stainless-steel drum resists wear and is easier to keep hygienically clean, for reliable performance year after year.

modules.head: More Visible, More Elegant
modules.body: Premium black-tinted tempered-glass door gives the washer a high-end appearance while letting you see the wash progress at a glance.

modules.head: Start, monitor and diagnose — from your phone
modules.body: The LG ThinQ® app lets you remotely start cycles, track progress, download new cycles and run Smart Diagnosis™ troubleshooting. Compatible with Amazon Alexa and Google Assistant voice control.
